title: [FIRRTL] Infer Domains Use-before-def Error
body:
I came across the following while doing a reduction:

``` mlir
firrtl.circuit "Foo" {
  firrtl.domain @ClockDomain
  firrtl.module private @Bar(in %clk: !firrtl.clock) {
  }
  firrtl.extmodule private @Baz(
    out B: !firrtl.domain<@ClockDomain()>,
    out out: !firrtl.clock domains [B]
  )
  firrtl.module @Foo() attributes {convention = #firrtl<convention scalarized>} {
    %wire = firrtl.wire : !firrtl.clock
    %wire_0 = firrtl.wire : !firrtl.clock
    firrtl.matchingconnect %wire_0, %wire : !firrtl.clock
    %Bar_clk = firrtl.instance Bar @Bar(in clk: !firrtl.clock)
    firrtl.matchingconnect %Bar_clk, %wire : !firrtl.clock
    %Baz_B, %Baz_out = firrtl.instance Baz @Baz(
      out B: !firrtl.domain<@ClockDomain()>,
      out out: !firrtl.clock domains [B]
    )
    firrtl.matchingconnect %wire_0, %Baz_out : !firrtl.clock
  }
}
```

Running this:

``` console
# circt-opt -pass-pipeline='builtin.module(firrtl.circuit(firrtl-infer-domains{mode=infer-all}))' circt/infer-domains-use-before-def.mlir
circt/infer-domains-use-before-def.mlir:13:16: error: operand #1 does not dominate this use
    %Bar_clk = firrtl.instance Bar @Bar(in clk: !firrtl.clock)
               ^
circt/infer-domains-use-before-def.mlir:13:16: note: see current operation: "firrtl.domain.define"(%2#0, %3#0) : (!firrtl.domain<@ClockDomain()>, !firrtl.domain<@ClockDomain()>) -> ()
circt/infer-domains-use-before-def.mlir:15:24: note: operand defined here (op in the same block)
    %Baz_B, %Baz_out = firrtl.instance Baz @Baz(
                       ^
```
